items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the scenario behavior related to 'Trial account data sandboxing', but there is no concrete evidence provided that confirms the expected outcome or the functionality of the sandboxing feature. The linked use cases and prior steps do not offer any direct evidence that supports the successful execution or validation of this scenario, leading to an inconclusive status.
